title: Dead Channel Protocol Story Theme Loop
prompt: Story: Dead Channel Protocol (dead-channel-protocol) | Hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move. | Subgenre: techno/paranormal thriller | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Smart-city control grid and abandoned transit nodes | Villain: Root Administrator | Villain worldview: Systems only become honest when people fear the output. | Motifs: error beeps, node maps, black-screen prompts. Compose original story theme loop with memorable motif, controlled dynamics, and compatibility with dialogue-overlays.
negativePrompt: Avoid clipping, avoid muddy low-end, avoid unintelligible dialogue, avoid abrupt loudness spikes, avoid copyrighted melodic references.
